text.title: Outsource Onboarding One-Pager Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Hiring contractor with engagement ≥2 weeks AND part-time remote?

branch.question: Signed agreement exists AND tool stack identified?
